response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, experienced engineer with genuine language-tooling interest (D test runners, assertion libraries) and real IDE development experience (NI LabWindows/CVI), but the core required stack is largely absent: no demonstrated Kotlin, only incidental Java exposure, and no Spring or enterprise JVM framework experience. Recent work centers on TypeScript/Node and DLang rather than JVM ecosystems, making the fit for a Java/Kotlin enterprise IDE role weak despite strong general engineering craftsmanship.
strengths: Hands-on IDE development experience (C/C++ components for NI LabWindows/CVI)
Authored developer tooling: test runners, assertion libraries, web frameworks in D
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, low-latency systems, large-scale services)
concerns: No Kotlin experience and only minor, dated Java exposure
No Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus, or enterprise JVM framework background
Recent focus (TypeScript/Node, AI tooling) diverges from JVM ecosystem depth required

key_factors.factor: IDE internals and dev-tooling track record
